mapper.select: SELECT sessionId, sellerId, buyerId, postId, createTime, lastMessageTime, isArchived, messageList FROM chatSession WHERE isArchived = false AND (buyerId = #{userId} OR sellerId = #{userId}) ORDER BY lastMessageTime DESC
SELECT sessionId, sellerId, buyerId, postId, createTime, lastMessageTime, isArchived, messageList FROM chatSession WHERE sessionId = #{sessionId}
